summary.userReportedBug: Dashboard room filter for secondary rooms (10-104, 11-105) returns 0 courses; classroom capacity for these rooms shows 0/0.
summary.rootCause: Real server-side primary-only filter bug in /api/schedule and getRoomCapacityRows.
summary.fix: Minimal: (1) schedule API room filter now uses Prisma OR (roomId=X OR additionalRooms.some({roomId:X})); (2) getRoomCapacityRows iterates slot.additionalRooms and dedupes per (roomId, slotId).
summary.expectedAfter: All four runtime filter surfaces (dashboard, single-week, Excel, capacity) treat secondary rooms as real rooms.

filesModified.change: room filter now uses OR: { roomId: targetId, additionalRooms: { some: { roomId: targetId } } }. Falls back to where.roomId for viewType !== 'room'.

Includes additionalRooms in Prisma query; iterates slot.additionalRooms during aggregation; dedupes per (roomId, slotId) via seenByRoom map to prevent double-count when a room appears as both primary and additional for the same slot.
Added K34-A3E stage-aware check: schedule route room filter now uses OR (server-side secondary room support).
New: 36 checks covering all five runtime surfaces.
New: read-only diagnostic for room 10-104 and 11-105.

filesNotModified: src/lib/schedule/adjustments.ts (getEffectiveScheduleForWeek already emits additionalRoomIds; client-side filter handles secondary)
src/app/api/export/excel/route.ts (raw branch already merges secondary; effective branch already client-side checks additionalRoomIds)

rootCauseAnalysis.dashboardRoomFilter: src/app/api/schedule/route.ts line 60-62 set where.roomId = targetId. Prisma exact-matches ScheduleSlot.roomId (primary only). Slots where the target room appears as additional in ScheduleSlotAdditionalRoom were never returned. Frontend applyViewFilter at dashboard-content.tsx line 138-142 already checks additionalRoomIds but never saw those slots because the API had filtered them out. Single-week path uses getEffectiveScheduleForWeek which does NOT accept viewType/targetId — returns full week; frontend client filter then handles both primary and additional, so single-week was already working. K34-A3E unifies the behavior.
rootCauseAnalysis.classroomCapacity: src/lib/rooms/capacity.ts line 47 'where: { roomId: { not: null } }' filtered ScheduleSlot to primary-only. Aggregation line 81-97 used slot.roomId only, missing additionalRooms. After fix: query includes additionalRooms; aggregation iterates both primary and additional with dedup.
rootCauseAnalysis.excelExport: Already fixed in K34-A3C: raw branch line 234-263 merges secondary-room slots; effective branch line 78-81 client-side checks additionalRoomIds. Not regressed by this stage.
rootCauseAnalysis.whyK34A3CVerifyMissed: K34-A3C verify used Prisma in-memory simulation: it fetched ALL slots for the semester, mapped to viewData shape, then ran an in-memory filter checking v.roomId === X || v.additionalRoomIds.includes(X). That filter PASSED because it was client-side on the full dataset. It never issued a real /api/schedule?viewType=room&targetId=X HTTP request, so the server-side primary-only filter was never exercised. K34-A3E verify replicates the actual server-side Prisma query directly and exposes the bug.

validation.k26K4C: 32/36 — 4 fails are pre-existing baseline hardcodes (lint 184/146 vs current 191/154, auth 53/1 vs current 60/62). K22-C, schema, score weights, HC6, K22 expected all PASS per script reports.
validation.authFoundation: 60/62 PASS — pre-existing ScheduleAdjustment ACTIVE count mismatch.
validation.lint: 191 errors / 154 warnings (unchanged from K34-A3D; no new lint issues introduced by K34-A3E)

manualVerificationRequired: 2. /dashboard 全部显示, room=10-104 should return 4 courses with composite display (e.g. 11-322 或 10-104)
3. /dashboard 全部显示, room=11-105 should return 6 courses
4. /dashboard single-week mode (e.g. week=1) with room=10-104 or 11-105 should also work
5. /dashboard with teacher=宋如武 still shows 17 courses with composite display
7. Excel export with room=10-104 or 11-105 includes the corresponding courses
8. No runtime error in browser console
